text.message: tell you what. trade me a brick back and no hard feelings
i have a lot of wheat
it wasnt about the wheat. youre now my enemy.
if u trade sheep ore yea
i dont want to hold 405 wheat
idc blue. you stole from me twice in the early game. when im behind.  bad table politics. youll learn
i did, you should have taken from orange. he was in the lead.
steal from him anyway, he was ahead.
